hero.slide1_title: Consult From The Comfort of Your Home
hero.slide1_sub: Quality medical consultations from anywhere, even with slow internet
hero.slide2_sub: Licensed medical experts ready to assist in your preferred language
hero.slide3_sub: Reliable video consultations available on any device

features_section.title: Designed for Accessibility and Efficiency in Nigeria
features_section.subtitle: UbiMD offers a seamless and secure way to conduct remote consultations, enhancing patient care and practice efficiency
features_section.card1_desc: Face to face consultation that works seamlessly on 2G/3G networks and older phones. Our optimized technology ensures you connect with doctors even with slow internet.
features_section.card2_desc: Get automatically paired with the right doctor based on your symptoms, language preference, and location. Find the perfect match every time.
features_section.card3_desc: Upload a photo of your medicine and our AI will identify it, explain its uses, and provide important information.
features_section.card4_desc: Get instant answers to basic health questions without logging in. Quick, convenient, and always available.
features_section.card5_desc: Every doctor on UbiMD is verified and licensed to practice in Nigeria. Get care from trusted professionals.
features_section.card6_desc: UbiMD works seamlessly across smartphones, tablets, and feature phones. Designed for everyone.

stats.title: Trusted Healthcare Platform
stats.sub: Empowering patients and doctors across Nigeria

how_it_works_section.title: Get Started with UbiMD Today
how_it_works_section.sub: Access quality healthcare in four simple steps. It’s fast, easy and designed for everyone
how_it_works_section.step1_desc: Create your free account in minutes using your phone number or email. No complicated forms or long waiting lines.
how_it_works_section.step2_desc: Provide your symptoms and medical concerns in a simple guided form. This helps match you to the right doctor.
how_it_works_section.step3_desc: Our smart matching system connects you to a specialist who speaks your preferred language and fits your needs.
how_it_works_section.step4_desc: Begin video chat or message the doctor instantly. Receive medical guidance designed just for you.

testimonials_section.title: Trusted by Patients and Doctors across Nigeria
testimonials_section.sub: See what our community has to say about their UbiMD experience
testimonials_section.t1_text: UbiMD made it possible to see a doctor from my village without travelling. The matching was perfect for my language! I spoke with a doctor in Yoruba and got the help I needed.
testimonials_section.t2_text: As a doctor, UbiMD helps me reach patients in remote areas who couldn’t access healthcare before. The platform works smoothly even with poor internet connection.
testimonials_section.t3_text: I love that I can ask quick questions on WhatsApp without creating an account. It’s so convenient and the responses are fast and helpful.
testimonials_section.t4_text: UbiMD helped me consult a specialist in Hausa. I didn't need to leave home — the experience felt personal and easy.
testimonials_section.rating_text: Rated 5 stars by thousands of satisfied users across Nigeria
